nasb.text: for behold, we were binding sheaves in the field, and lo, my sheaf rose up and also stood erect; and behold, your sheaves gathered around and bowed down to my sheaf.”

esv.text: Behold, we were binding sheaves in the field, and behold, my sheaf arose and stood upright. And behold, your sheaves gathered around it and bowed down to my sheaf.”

cnv.text: 我們正在田間捆麥子，我的麥捆忽然站立起來，你們的麥捆都來圍著我的下拜。”

ccb.text: 我们在田里捆庄稼，我捆的庄稼站起来，你们捆的庄稼都围着我捆的庄稼下拜。”

csbs.text: 我们正在田间绑禾捆。看哪，我的禾捆起来立着，你们的禾捆都围着我的禾捆下拜！”
